name: codeflow-shell
description: CodeFlow Shell — minimal executable wrapper around @codeflow/runtime. v0.2.0-beta.2 (MT-2 + MT-3 + MT-4 bundle): MT-2 = agent.send() local.force=true (BUG-SDK-002); MT-3 = .env.example CURSOR_DEFAULT_MODEL default not auto (BUG-SDK-003); MT-4 = ReviewEngine.extractText() walks SDKAssistantMessage content[] (BUG-SDK-004 — fixes verdict_parse_failed → needs_human collapse on real-SDK reviews). All four BUG-SDK-001..004 closed.
